title: August 2023 Monthly Manager’s Report
summary: August 8, 2023 SUMMARY Good afternoon! I hope everyone is enjoying our sporadically warm summer, even with the cooler weather it seems to have flown by remarkably fast. Looking ahead, our fall schedule is filling up with the Alaska Power Association’s (APA) Annual Meeting, National Rural Electric Cooperative Association (NRECA) and Cooperative Finance Corporation (CFC) Regional meetings, and Northwest Public Power Association Board of Trustee meeting…..not to mention the yet to be scheduled HEA Area Meetings. The following are brief updates on HEA’s current business activities and strategic goals that have taken place over the last month. As always, a more detailed report will be given on th...

title: Save the date! Bering Science Webinar 8/29
summary: Join us on Tuesday, Aug 29, at 11:00 am for an overview of the Bering Science publication, featuring speakers on crab, harmful algal blooms, climate, and salmon. title: $50k of 2023 SBIR Phase 0 Awards Go to Alaskan Companies
summary: We extend our congratulations to the five Alaskan companies who have been selected to receive a 2023 SBIR Phase 0 Award!
